courseTitle: Advanced AI, Simulation, and Procedural Systems
title: Emergent Narrative Simulation Game
genericDescription: Connect simulation events to story interpretation; generate narrative from systems; preserve player-readable causality.
specificDescription: Build a game where story arises from agents, resources, relationships, or world events. Include a chronicle, newspaper, log, rumor board, or recap generated from play.
gradingRubric: 30 pts emergence; 20 pts narrative readability; 20 pts systemic causality; 15 pts recap artifact; 15 pts reflection.
